title: Treatment and management of impulse control disorders
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — medication, CBT, and behavioural management for impulse control disorders.
learningObjectives: Evaluate aversive conditioning and covert sensitisation.
Assess relapse prevention and support programmes.

simpleExplanation.title: Breaking the impulse cycle
simpleExplanation.summary: Treatment targets urges through drugs that stabilise mood, therapy that builds coping skills, and behavioural techniques that reduce reinforcement.

sections.content: **ICD treatment** (1.3.3) completes 1.3. Compare **drug vs behavioural** effectiveness.

sections.label: Mark an impulse control treatment question
